Label: This will remove you and/or your organisation from the case. You will no longer represent the client.
Who do you wish to remove from this case?

When you submit this page, you will be removed from this case and it will no longer appear on your case list.

A notification will be sent to all parties on this case.

This is a new online process - you don't need to file any further documents in relation to this notice of change with the court.

When you submit this page, your organisation will no longer be representing this client and it will not appear in your organisation's case list.

A notification will be sent to all parties on this case.

This is a new online process - you don't need to file any further documents in relation to this notice of change with the court.

You should check the boxes to 'sign' when
- Your organisation will no longer be representing the claimant.
- You have served notice of this change to your former client.

You should check the boxes to 'sign' when
- Your organisation will no longer be representing the respondent.
- You have served notice of this change to your former client.
